description_long: This lamp features a rounded wall-mounted base with a short arm supporting a bell-shaped shade. The shade is intricately perforated with ornate, decorative cutouts, allowing light to pass through in patterned beams. The lamp's body appears to be made primarily of metal, with a smooth, hard surface and a matte or slightly glossy finish. The mounting hardware is visible, suggesting it is designed for secure attachment to a vertical surface. The open bottom of the shade allows for direct downward illumination, while the perforations add an ambient decorative effect. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for urban or residential exteriors.
description: A wall-mounted lamp with an ornate, perforated metal shade and a rounded base, designed for decorative and functional lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the perforated shade and the circular wall mount.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the arm connecting the base to the shade and the detailed cutouts.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the open end of the shade and the interior cavity for the bulb.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the arm and the ornate patterning on the shade.
